query:
SELECT 'skiptracingLogs.agentName LIKE Robert' as ref, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM skiptracingLogs WHERE agentName LIKE '%Robert%' OR agentName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'skiptracingLogs.agentName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM skiptracingLogs WHERE agentName LIKE '%Jack%' OR agentName LIKE '%Zack%' OR agentName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'outreachLogs.agentName LIKE Robert', COUNT(*) FROM outreachLogs WHERE agentName LIKE '%Robert%' OR agentName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'outreachLogs.agentName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM outreachLogs WHERE agentName LIKE '%Jack%' OR agentName LIKE '%Zack%' OR agentName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'automatedFollowUps.createdByName LIKE Robert', COUNT(*) FROM automatedFollowUps WHERE createdByName LIKE '%Robert%' OR createdByName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'automatedFollowUps.createdByName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM automatedFollowUps WHERE createdByName LIKE '%Jack%' OR createdByName LIKE '%Zack%' OR createdByName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'smsTemplates.createdByName LIKE Robert', COUNT(*) FROM smsTemplates WHERE createdByName LIKE '%Robert%' OR createdByName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'smsTemplates.createdByName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM smsTemplates WHERE createdByName LIKE '%Jack%' OR createdByName LIKE '%Zack%' OR createdByName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'leadAssignments.agentId=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM leadAssignments WHERE agentId = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'leadAssignments.agentId=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM leadAssignments WHERE agentId = 12030025
UNION ALL
SELECT 'propertyAgents.agentId=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM propertyAgents WHERE agentId = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'propertyAgents.agentId=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM propertyAgents WHERE agentId = 12030025
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stageHistory.changedBy=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM stageHistory WHERE changedBy = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stageHistory.changedBy=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM stageHistory WHERE changedBy = 12030025
UNION ALL
SELECT 'visits.userId=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM visits WHERE userId = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'visits.userId=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM visits WHERE userId = 12030025;
